name: Zoho Desk API
what_it_does: Zoho Desk REST API for cloud-based customer support and help desk platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage support tickets, retrieve customer interaction history, automate ticket routing, access CSAT and SLA data, and integrate Zoho Desk into CRM and customer experience workflows. Zoho Desk is tightly integrated with Zoho CRM and the broader Zoho ecosystem.
use_cases: Creating and routing support tickets from automated triage agents
Retrieving ticket history and customer context from support workflow agents
Monitoring SLA compliance and escalation triggers from operations agents
Integrating Zoho Desk data into CRM and post-ticket NPS survey agents
not_for: IT internal ticketing without customer service component
High-volume transactional support without agent-led workflow
best_when: A customer support team using Zoho Desk wants AI agents to triage tickets, retrieve customer history, and integrate support data into CRM and escalation workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer support tickets contain personal data and sensitive customer interactions. GDPR compliance required. Handle customer data per support agreements.

auth.notes: Zoho Desk uses Zoho OAuth 2.0. Scopes include Desk.tickets.READ, Desk.tickets.UPDATE, Desk.contacts.READ, Desk.search.READ, etc. Access tokens expire in 1 hour with refresh token rotation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 3 agents, basic features, limited API access
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard, Professional, and Enterprise plans scaling agents and features
pricing.notes: Competitive SMB-to-enterprise pricing. Part of Zoho ecosystem with native CRM integration.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests per minute per OAuth client

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer support conversations are personal data — GDPR compliance required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — refresh token rotation essential for long-running agents
orgId (organization ID) required as header on all API calls
Rate limit of 100 req/min — implement back-off for bulk ticket operations
Zoho ecosystem integration is tight — consider Zoho CRM API alongside for full context
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer support conversations and contact data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer support PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular ticket/contact scopes. Multi-region.
